message:
chore(gitignore): Add patterns for NTM and compiled binaries

Adds ignore patterns for:
- .ntm/ directory used by NTM agent coordination
- a.out compiled binary files

These are runtime artifacts that should not be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,3 +57,9 @@ docs/fcp_additional_connectors_prioritized.md
 # apr runtime locks
 .apr/.locks/
 fuzz/target/
+
+# NTM agent coordination
+.ntm/
+
+# Compiled binaries
+a.out
